title: ADEPTNA DIY 10 PC Sand Art Glitter and Glow Kit for Kids Toddlers – Create Your Own Creative Craft DIY with Assorted Shape Bottles and Pendant Decorative Glitters Sand Activity Art
features: ENHANCE YOUR CHILD’S CREATIVITY - This Art kit enables your child to use his/her hands-on abilities, their creativity, their artistic capacity, and their colour discrimination knowledge in the process of creating various bottle decoration with this colourful sand glitter.
IDEAL GIFT IDEA - This kit can be gifted to your child at anytime of the year – Be it birthday, Xmas, holiday or just any day as a token of love. A perfect and unique gift!

COLOURFUL GLITTER SAND ACTIVITY - All-in-one sand art activity kit helps your kid to make unbelievable masterpieces of DIY rainbow sand. A great activity for your child on any day. Create amazing glow in the dark sand art!

SPEND QUALITY TIME WITH YOUR CHILD - The ultimate toy to deepen relationship between a parent and a child. It can be built by parents and children and can be placed in bottles of various forms in the night – to enjoy the glow. Keep enjoying an unforgettable and fascinating time together – And this kit shall enhance bonding with family members.

PACKAGE CONTENTS - This Package contents 8 Sand Art Bottles with Caps, 2 Pendant Bottles with Caps, 8 Colours of Sand, 2 Glow Sand (Green and Pink), 2 Bags of Glitter, 2 Satin Cord, 1 Plastic Funnel, 1 Design Tool and 41 Stickers. A great way to develop fine motor skills, hand-eye co-ordination and promote creativity in children.
